series_metadata.series_description: System project files containing proposals, cost figures,award letters, meeting minutes and related correspondence for developing the ChildSupport Enforcement Tracking System. Also, contains system procedures, maintenanceand testing data, report scripts, job control language, and master tape procedures.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until the system is superseded, obsolete or replaced, then review by StateArchives for possible retention. Destroy if no historical value to the Archives. ; Electronic: Retain until the system is superseded, obsolete or replaced, then review by State Archives for possible retention. Destroy if no historical value to the Archives., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
